creator: stadtkind2@gmx.de
text:
On Thu, 05 Jan 2012, RJ Bergeron wrote:

> Having a similar hang with an EPIA P820 board. Recompiling the kernel
> (used the -RC3 sources that were on CD) without the snd_hda driver
> allows the system to boot. It seems to come up without a problem.

A kernel compiled with

nodevice snd_hda

boots indeed fine.

I also tried the hdac patch from

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=228726

to get support for the VIA VT1708S High Definition Audio Codec on my board,
still no joy (i.e. booting a kernel compiled with 228726 freezes as well)

Seems like FreeBSD 9.0-REL will be unusable for VIA mainboard owners.
